report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#435-439) and Newsletter v40 covering veTokenomics (veCRV $3B+ gauge emissions, Curve Wars, sPENDLE), Institutional Custody (Fireblocks $10T+, SAB 121 repeal, MPC/HSM/Multi-Sig), Extreme Fear Week 2 (F&G 12, 8+ days sub-15, +114% 180d median), Wormhole $90M unlock + bridge security, and DeFi Governance cluster launch. 2 new social card SVGs created (veTokenomics+Custody combo, Extreme Fear Week 2). Content calendar extends through Apr 17 across v40 cycle. 2 new guides (veTokenomics, Institutional Custody) built since last community report. F&G at 12 — extreme fear day 8+.

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: NEW CONTENT SINCE LAST COMMUNITY REPORT: 2 new learn guides — veTokenomics & Vote-Escrowed Tokens (684 lines, intermediate, covers veCRV, Curve Wars, Convex, bribe markets, sPENDLE) + Crypto Custody Solutions for Institutions (725 lines, intermediate, MPC/HSM/Multi-Sig, Fireblocks, SAB 121). Learn page count now 82 in Degen0x workspace. 10 guides built today across 5 build cycles.

DEFI GOVERNANCE CLUSTER COMPLETE: Tokenomics → veTokenomics → DAO Governance → Real Yield — four interconnected guides creating strong topic authority. Internal linking creates a learning path. Tool opportunities: ve Calculator (voting power decay) and Custody Comparison tool.

INSTITUTIONAL NARRATIVE ACCELERATING: SAB 121 repeal + MiCA live in EU + CLARITY Act markup imminent = strongest institutional on-ramp catalyst window in crypto history. Fireblocks $10T+ transferred, Coinbase Prime $330B+ AUC, Fidelity/BNY Mellon/State Street all entering custody. The custody guide captures this narrative at the inflection point.

EXTREME FEAR WEEK 2 — ACCUMULATION SIGNAL: F&G at 12, day 8+ of sub-15 trough. Only 7 occurrences since 2018 inception. Every single instance was followed by significant positive returns. Median 90-day: +72%, 180-day: +114%. The DCA Calculator and Fear & Greed Index tool are experiencing peak-relevance alignment.

WORMHOLE TOKEN UNLOCK: 600M+ $W tokens unlocking today — $90M+ in new supply. Coming 5 days after Drift's $285M bridge exploit. Cross-chain bridge security narrative intensifying. Our bridges guide is positioned to capture search demand from both events.

MACRO CATALYST PIPELINE — APRIL MID-MONTH: Fed minutes Apr 8 (done by v40 launch), Senate returns Apr 13, Beige Book Apr 15, CLARITY Act markup late April, FOMC Apr 28-29. Each catalyst generates content hooks and social engagement opportunities. Content calendar v40 (Apr 12-17) aligns with Senate return and Beige Book release.
